about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: About Myself
about.name: wine-5
about.description: I'm studying game development at a specialized school. My specialty is game development using Unity and C#.
about.fullDescription:
I'm a programmer aiming to enter the gaming industry! I mainly develop games using Unity and DxLib, and I focus on architecture and class design to ensure flexibility and ease of implementation when specifications change or new features are added!
Continuously learning and enjoying programming is my greatest strength!
